# QGroundControl AI Assistant Guide

The canonical AI agent guide is [AGENTS.md](../AGENTS.md). It covers critical
files, golden rules, code structure, CI layout, build/test commands, and
quick patterns. Read it first.

Topic-specific references (also linked from AGENTS.md):

|Document|Content|
|--------|-------|
|[CODING_STYLE.md](../CODING_STYLE.md)|Naming, formatting, QML style, C++20 features|
|[CONTRIBUTING.md](CONTRIBUTING.md)|Architecture patterns (Fact System, Multi-Vehicle, FirmwarePlugin), PR process|
|[tools/README.md](../tools/README.md)|Build commands, development scripts|
|[test/TESTING.md](../test/TESTING.md)|Test framework, base classes, CTest labels|
